text.title: rust-testing-property Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the rust-testing-property methodology end-to-end.

step.name: identify-pure-fn-and-invariant
step.action: Pick a pure function + state its invariant in one sentence.

step.name: write-strategy
step.action: Use proptest strategies appropriate to the input space.

step.name: author-proptest-block
step.decision-gate: If returns f64, switch to approx::assert_relative_eq!.
